text_fr: 1440  (XIV).  Rapport du Comite de negociation dee  fond&  extra-budgetaires
text_en: 1440 (XIV). Report of the Extra-budgetary Substantive Negotiating Committee

text_fr: Ayant examine le  rapport du  Comite  de  negociation des  fonds  extra-budgetaires 31 nomme a la  treizieme session  de  l' Assemblee  generale,
text_en: Having considered the report of the Committee on the Negotiation of Extra-budgetary Funds 31 appointed at the Thirteenth Session of the General Assembly,

items_fr: 1. Aussitot  que  possible  apres  l'ouverture  de  la quinzieme session de l' Assemblee generate, ii sera reuni, sous la presidence du President de I' Assemblee a ladite session,  une commission  speciale  composee  de  tous  les membres de l' Assemblee,  devant laquelle  seront annon› cees les  contributions  volontaires  aux  programmes interessant les  refugies pour l'exercice suivant;

2. Les Etats qui  ne  sont pas membres de  !'Organi› sation des Nations Unies, mais qui font partie d'une ou de  plusieurs  institutions  specialisees,  seront  invites a assister aux·reunions de la commission speciale  en vue d'y  annoncer  leurs  contributions  aux  programmes interessant  les  refugies ;

3. Pour  que  le  plus  grand  nombre  d'Etats soient representes, il  sera donne d'avance la plus large publicite possible  aux  reunions  de  la  commission  speciale,  qui seront organisees de  fru;on a ne  coincider  avec  aucune autre reunion.
items_en: 1. As soon as possible after the opening of the fifty-fifth session of the General Assembly, a special committee shall be convened under the chairmanship of the President of the Assembly at that session, composed of all the members of the Assembly, to which the voluntary contributions to the programmes of interest to refugees for the following financial year shall be paid;

2. States which are not members of the United Nations, but which are part of one or more specialized institutions, shall be invited to attend the meetings of the Special Committee with a view to announcing their contributions to the programmes of interest to refugees;

3. In order for the largest number of states to be represented, the meetings of the special committee, which will be organised by the committee, will be given the widest possible publicity in advance; no other meeting will be held.

items_fr: 1. Prie le  President  de  l' Assemblee  generate  de nommer  un  comite  de  negociation  des  fonds  extra› budgetaires,  compose  de dix  membres  au  plus  et  dote du  meme  mandat  que  celui  qui  est  enonce  clans  la resolution  693  (VII)  de  I' Assemblee,  en  date  du  25 octobre  1952,  ce  mandat  allant  de  la  cloture  de  la quatorzieme session a la cloture de la quinzieme session de l' Assemblee ;
2. Decide d'inscrire a l'ordre du  jour provisoire  de sa quinzieme  session  la  question  intitulee  "Rapport du Comite de negociation des fonds  extra-budgetaires".
items_en: 1. Requests the President of the General Assembly to appoint a committee for the negotiation of extra-budgetary funds, composed of not more than ten members and having the same mandate as that set out in Assembly Resolution 693 (VII) of 25 October 1952, from the closure of the fourth session to the closure of the fifth session of the Assembly;
2. Decides to include in the provisional agenda of its fifty-fifth session the item entitled "Report of the Committee on the Negotiation of Extra-budgetary Funds".

text_fr: A  la  846eme  seance  plenicrc,  le  5  decembrc  1959,  le  Pre› sident  de  l' Assemblee  g,foerale  a  nomme  U11  C omite  de  nego› ciation  des  fonds  extra-budgetaires  qu1 rcstera  en  fonC'tions jusqu'd  la  cloture  de la quinzieme  session  de  l'Assemblee.  Le Comite  se  compose  des  Etats  M~embres  suivants: ARGENTINE, BRESIL, CANADA, ETATS-UN1s  D'AMERIQUE,  FRANCE,  LIBAN, NouvELLE-ZELANDE,  PAKISTAN et RoYAUME-lJNr  DE  GRANDE› BRETAGNE ET  D'lRLANDE DU  NORD.
text_en: At the 846th plenary session, on the 5th December 1959, the President of the General Assembly appointed U11 C omite de nego›ciation des fonds extra-budgetaires que1 rcstera en fontions jus la cloture de la quinzieme session de l'Assemblée. The Committee consists of the following Member States: ARGENTINA, BRAZIL, CANADA, UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, FRANCE, LIban, Nouvelle-Zelande, PAKISTAN and RoYAUME-lJNr DE GRANDE› BRETAGNE AND NORTHERN IRELAND.

text_fr: Rappe/ant ses resolutions  1089  (XI) du 21  decembre 1956,  1151  (XII) du 22 novembre 1957 et 1337  (XIII) du  13  decembre  1958,
text_en: Recalling its resolutions 1089 (XI) of 21 December 1956, 1151 (XII) of 22 November 1957 and 1337 (XIII) of 13 December 1958,

text_fr: Ayant  examine les  observations  presentees  par  les Etats  Membres  au  sujet  du  financement  de  la  Force d'urgence des  Nations  Unies,
text_en: Having considered the comments submitted by Member States on the financing of the United Nations Emergency Force,

text_fr: Ayant examine le  projet de  budget relatif a la  Force presente  par le  Secretaire general pour l'a11:nee  1960 88 ainsi  que  Jes  observations  et  re~ommand'.1t~ons  ~ue  le Comite consultatif pour Jes  questions  adm1mstrat1ves  et budgetaires  a  formulees  a ce  sujet  dans  ses  onzieme 84 et  vingt-huitieme 3 ~ rapports  a  l'Assemblee  generate ( quatorzieme  session),
text_en: Having examined the draft budget for the Force presented by the Secretary-General for the year 1960-88 and the observations and recommendations made by the Advisory Committee on Questions adm1strat1ves and Budgetaires on this subject in its eleventh and twenty-eighth reports to the General Assembly (fourteenth session),

text_fr: Ayant note  avec  satisfaction qu'une assistance  finan› ciere  speciale  d'un montant  d'environ 3.475.~ dollars a  ete  annoncee a titre de  contributions volonta1res  aux depenses de la  Force en 1%0,
text_en: Having noted with satisfaction that financial and special assistance in the amount of approximately $3,475.~ was pledged as voluntary contributions to the expenditure of the Force in 1%0,

text_fr: Consuicrant qu'il est  souhaitable  d'utiliser les  contri› butions volontaires versees a titre d'assistance financiere speciale  de  maniere a reduire  la  charge  fin~i:ici~re  des Etats qui  sont  le  moins  en  mesure,  comme  l !nd1que  le bareme  ordinaire  des  quotes-parts,  de  contnbuer  aux depenses relatives a l'entretien de la Force,
text_en: Considering that it is desirable to use the voluntary contributions paid as special financial assistance to reduce the final burden here of the States which are least able, as the ordinary scale of assessments, to contribute to the expenditure relating to the maintenance of the Force,

items_fr: 1. Autorise le  Secretaire general a depenser,  a con› currence de 20 millions de dollars,  la somme necessaire au  maintien  en  fonctions  de  la  Force  d'urgence des Nations  Unies pendant l'annee 1%0;

2. Decide de mettre en recouvrement la somme de 20 millions  de  dollars  entre  tous  Jes  Etats  Membres  de l'Organisation des Nat ions U nies,, sur la base ?U b~r~me ordinaire des quotes-parts, sous reserve des d1spos1t10ns des  paragraphes  3  et  4  ci-dessous ;

3. Decide que les contributions volontaires annoncees avant  le  31  decembre  1959 au  titre des  depenses  de la Force en  1960 seront utilisees  pour reduire de  SO  pour 100  Jes  contributions  du  plus  grand  nombre  d'Etats Membres  possible,  en  commem;ant  par Jes  Etats a qui est  assignee  la  quote-part  minimum  de  0,04  pour  100, puis  en  continuant  par  ceux  a qui  sont  assignees  des quotes-parts  progressivement  plus  elevees,  jusqu'a ce que le  montant total de::;  contributions volontaires ait ete integralement utilise ;

4. [)hide que,  si  des  Etats  Membres  renoncent a Ja  reduction prevue au paragraphe 3 ci-dessus, Jes  mon› tants correspondants seront portes au credit du chapitre 9  du budget de la  Force pour 1960.
items_en: 1. Authorizes the Secretary-General to spend $20 million on the maintenance of the United Nations Emergency Force during the year of 1%0;

2. Decides to assess the sum of $20 million among all Member States of the Organization of the United Nations, on the basis of the same ordinary assessment, subject to the provisions of paragraphs 3 and 4 below;

3. Decides that the voluntary contributions pledged before 31 December 1959 for the expenditure of the Force in 1960 shall be used to reduce by SO per 100 of the largest possible number of Member States, commemorating by Is States which is allocated the minimum share of 0.04 per 100, then continuing by those which are assigned progressively higher shares, until the total amount of::; Voluntary contributions have been used in full;
4. [)hide that, if Member States renounce the reduction provided for in paragraph 3 above, Jes mon› so many corresponding will be credited to Chapter 9 of the 1960 budget of the Force.
